title: How on earth
wikitext:
[]: How on earth?             Quote Post by jaklevo » Thu Oct 01, 2009 4:43 am In episode 08, how do Shinji/Asuka get between the ships? They land on the aircraft carrier but somehow get over to the ship that's transporting unit 02. They seem to be standing on some kind of escalator for a while. Is there some kind of underwater bridge between ships? This has stumped me for a long time. Excuse my forum newbiness. I am new.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Oct 01, 2009 6:26 am

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Thu Oct 01, 2009 6:34 am Who flew the helicopter?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 01, 2009 6:38 am Hey, never noticed that before. Good eye, Ornette.

[]:             Quote Post by Cailet » Thu Oct 01, 2009 8:43 am AyrYntake wrote: Who flew the helicopter?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 01, 2009 9:46 am Or Asuka just walked up to someone on the flight deck and said she needed to check on her Eva for some reason, and a pilot was assigned for the requested taxi service.

[]:             Quote Post by Fredrick2003 » Thu Oct 01, 2009 9:52 am Well look at that... They didn't "show" her getting there but clearly she got there, so I guess we just leave it at that. Only so many minutes in an episode and they wanted to focus on other scenes.

[]: Re: How on earth?             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Thu Oct 01, 2009 12:08 pm jaklevo wrote: In episode 08, how do Shinji/Asuka get between the ships?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 01, 2009 1:13 pm Teleportation, of course. BAMF!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Oct 01, 2009 6:00 pm Misato, Shinji and the classmates at least were dropped off to the ship(s) in a helicopter, so I'm guessing Asuka was in the same situation, considering what the screencap shows. (Kaji also took a helicopter to get the heck out of the area.) And IIRC, episode 22' shows a shot of some planes/aircrafts sitting outside the ship during the flashback of Asuka's failed seduction with Kaji. NemZ wrote: Good eye, Ornette.

[]:             Quote Post by jaklevo » Thu Oct 01, 2009 9:55 pm In hindsight my question seems pretty dumb, considering that helicopter was in pretty plain view. ...underwater bridge...what was I thinking?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Thu Oct 01, 2009 9:56 pm jaklevo wrote: ...underwater bridge...what was I thinking?

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat Oct 03, 2009 2:09 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: (Kaji also took a helicopter to get the heck out of the area.)

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Sat Oct 03, 2009 5:36 am Alaska Slim wrote: No, it was a Yak-38 special AND DON'T FORGET IT!

[]:             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Mon Oct 12, 2009 12:56 am Isn't Asuka also a captain in the Air Force or something? So the helicopter thing isn't extremely far fetched at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 12, 2009 1:33 am Iam(not)toji wrote: Isn't Asuka also a captain in the Air Force or something?

[]:             Quote Post by Iam(not)toji » Mon Oct 12, 2009 1:35 am Shit. Okay nevermind.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Thu Oct 15, 2009 7:37 pm ath wrote: Alaska Slim wrote: No, it was a Yak-38 special AND DON'T FORGET IT!

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Oct 15, 2009 7:58 pm LeoXiao wrote: ath wrote: Alaska Slim wrote: No, it was a Yak-38 special AND DON'T FORGET IT!

[]:             Quote Post by ath » Fri Oct 16, 2009 3:47 pm LeoXiao wrote: BUT IT'S COOL. And definitely a lot more interesting than a Harrier or something like that.
summary:
[]: How on earth?             Quote Post by jaklevo » Thu Oct 01, 2009 4:43 am In episode 08, how do Shinji/Asuka get between the ships? They land on the aircraft carrier but somehow get over to the ship that's transporting unit 02. They seem to be standing on some kind of escalator for a while. Is there some kind of underwater bridge between ships? This has stumped me for a long time. Excuse my forum newbiness. I am new.

[]:  &nb
